summary: Backend testing for Phase 1 AI Prompt Intelligence Plan. All 31 tests passed. Verified new intent detection for SCANNER, QUICK_QUOTE, and RISK_CHECK, plus existing intents continue to work correctly.

minor.issue: 'where is TSLA' (without 'at') extracts 'IS' as symbol instead of 'TSLA' due to regex pattern r"where\s+(?:is\s+)?([A-Z]{1,5})" capturing 'IS'
'portfolio risk' routes to position_query instead of risk_check due to pattern matching order - position_patterns checked before risk_check_patterns

SCANNER_INTENT.details: 'find me a trade', 'any setups', 'trade ideas', 'show me scanner', 'what setups forming', response format

QUICK_QUOTE_INTENT.details: 'price of AAPL', 'TSLA quote', 'MSFT quote', 'where is TSLA at', 'quote for NVDA', response format, metadata symbols

RISK_CHECK_INTENT.details: 'what is my risk exposure', 'check my risk', 'how much am I risking', 'portfolio risk', 'what's my exposure', no positions response

EXISTING_INTENTS.details: ANALYSIS, POSITION_QUERY, COACHING, MARKET_INFO all still work correctly

METADATA_ROUTING.details: Scanner, quote, and risk all use pattern matching (routing_method='pattern')

EDGE_CASES.details: Empty message, multiple symbols, no scanner alerts

API_RESPONSE_STRUCTURE.details: All required fields present in response (success, response, intent, agent_used, metadata)

features_verified.scanner_response_format: PASS - Returns formatted results with setup details (symbol, entry, stop, target, R:R, probability)
features_verified.quick_quote_price_of_symbol: PASS - Routes to quote_handler, returns price/bid/ask
features_verified.risk_check_no_positions: PASS - Returns 'No open positions' message when no positions
features_verified.existing_analysis: PASS - 'analyze NVDA' routes to analyst agent
features_verified.existing_position_query: PASS - 'what are my positions' routes to coach
features_verified.existing_coaching: PASS - 'how am I doing' routes to coaching

action_items: MINOR: Consider moving risk_check_patterns check BEFORE position_patterns in router_agent.py._pattern_match() so 'portfolio risk' correctly routes to risk_check instead of position_query
MINOR: Fix quick_quote_patterns regex r"where\s+(?:is\s+)?([A-Z]{1,5})" to properly capture symbol in 'where is TSLA' format
critical_code_review_comments: All three Phase 1 intents (SCANNER, QUICK_QUOTE, RISK_CHECK) implemented correctly in router_agent.py Intent enum
_handle_scanner_request returns well-formatted results with priority grouping (high/medium)
_handle_quick_quote correctly calculates midpoint price when last price unavailable (bid/ask fallback)
_handle_risk_check provides comprehensive risk analysis with exposure, P&L, and warnings
Pattern matching order causes 'portfolio risk' to match position_patterns before risk_check_patterns - consider reordering
seed_data_creation: None - tests use live API responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 verified Phase 1 AI Prompt Intelligence Plan with 31 tests. All new intents (SCANNER, QUICK_QUOTE, RISK_CHECK) work correctly via POST /api/agents/chat. Two minor pattern matching issues noted: (1) 'portfolio risk' routes to position_query due to pattern order, (2) 'where is TSLA' without 'at' extracts 'IS' not 'TSLA'. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_ai_prompt_intelligence_phase1.py can be reused for regression testing.
